statement: Ruler already provides author-once -> multi-target emit across Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code and Codex, deterministically at apply-time, as a mature MIT-licensed CLI.

evidence.quote: Automatic Distribution... applying rules to configuration files of supported AI agents (GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, Cursor, OpenAI Codex CLI...). v0.3.42 (May 2026), MIT, ~2.7k stars.
Rule Files (*.md): Discovered recursively from .ruler/ and concatenated in order... ruler apply distributes to each agent's native format.

falsifier: Evidence that ruler cannot emit to one of Copilot/Cursor/Claude Code/Codex, or that the project is unmaintained (no release since 2025).
